Portfolio

Introduction

I’m an indie game developer, avid programmer, and artist. I am experienced in Java, C#, Unity 3D, Blender, and git. I am dedicated to making innovative and artistic products. In the next 5 years I plan to further my education in computer science, widen my skillset in development, and publish more games.

My resume is linked here

Contents

  • Games
  • Unity Tech Demos
  • Other programs
  • Blender

Games

Innkeeper Game

Progress and plans are on the Trello

This is an untitled, in-progress innkeeper game. The player is an innkeeper who needs to maintain and manage their inn by serving customers, cooking, buying ingredients, cleaning, selling rooms, and more.

The game and its assets were made entirely by me.

Shattered

A game where the player needs to gather soul fragments by connecting with them and gravitating towards them. The game was designed and developed with Unity 3D in less than 48 hours by two programmers (including me) and four artists for the GMTK 2021 game jam. I coded the main player controller, most of the UI, and the scene management. The theme was chosen by GMTK.

Out of Controls

A game based on the idea that the payer’s controls are their health-bar. The controls can be disabled by enemies, and when all the controls are destroyed, the player dies. I designed the UI and coded most of the game logic. The game was designed and developed with Unity 3D in less than 48 hours in a team of two for the GMTK 2020 game jam. The theme was chosen by GMTK.

Whack and Blite

Game Jolt link here

A time-based platformer game in which the player switches between two modes. Black mode where white platforms are visible, or white mode where black platforms are visible.

The game and its assets were made entirely by me.

Unity Demos

Heightmap Errosion

This Unity project simulates simple errosion on a heightmap. It procedurally generates a mesh based off of the heightmap information.

Procedural Trees

This Unity project procedurally generates the mesh of a tree, then procedurally generates a skeleton and rigs it to the mesh. Then, physics and colliders are applied to the skeleton, allowing it to interact with the surrounding world. This video shows several of these procedural trees being destroyed by a physics sphere.

Destructible Planet

This Unity project uses the marching cubes algorithm to make a destructible planet. Since this algorithm would be extremely slow on this scale, the project uses parallel computing on the GPU (with compute shaders) to acheive quick framerates. The player’s movement is also made to rotate and “gravitate” towards the planet’s center.

Programs

PhoneticChanges.jl

GitHub link here

PhoneticChanges.jl is an automated tool to apply series of linguistic sound changes to words using IPA. It was as a tool for conlanging.

Blender

Elvish Blacksmith Blender timelapse

This is a timelapse of the modeling of a character I plan to use in my innkeeper game. It demonstrates my experience in Blender and artistic abilities.
